---
title: "Elspeth Catherine Barter"
---

## Elspeth Catherine Barter

**Dates:** (11 Feb 1843- 27 March 1938)

**Maiden name:** (Moberly)

### Description

daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

She married  (10 Sept 1863) the Rev. Henry Barter (1835/6-1901), from 1868 Vicar of Shipton-under-Wychwood. Referred to as Kitty Barter, she is not to be confused with Kate Barter, her sister-in-law, or with her husband’s cousin Katharine Mary (Barter) Wordsworth (d.1897). [<i>Dulce Domum</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from July 28th [1893?]
- Letter from Nov 21st 1877 
- Letter from Sept 26th [1868-9?]
- Letter from Aug 28th [1869]
- Letter from June 1855.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
